title: Omega Gold Pro caught the sell off
author: Loose-Object-8913
selftext:
Hello everyone! 

Quick little update for this week so far. 

The EA opened a sell last week when trend was confirmed. I was watching the level closely myself.   
Next thing you know the EA enters and stayed calm in the rough.   
Patience has now officially doing us good.   
It now has a pyramid add to the winning trend. 

Happy to answer any questions. 

I also have a telegram group in my profile top post 🙂

comments.author: InnerGarage4519
comments.body: The secret to infinite wealth is “OmegaGoldPro”
